# paren-fuzz mismatches (seed=0xbadc0de1, corpus=100)
# 6 mismatches recorded; see README.md for format.

--- mismatch 1 (family=seed) ---
SQL:      SELECT * FROM (T JOIN U)
pg:       reject(42601)
omni:     joined_table
pg_err:   42601: syntax error at or near ")"
omni_err: 
duration: 807.375µs

--- mismatch 2 (family=joined-table) ---

pg:       reject(42601)
omni:     joined_table
pg_err:   42601: syntax error at or near ")"
omni_err: 
duration: 824.542µs
